taxonomy: Dinetus duclouxii is classified as a species within the genus Dinetus, which belongs to the family Dinetidae. The family Dinetidae is part of the order Megaloptera, a group of insects commonly known as alderflies or snakeflies. The order Megaloptera is further classified under the class Insecta. Insecta is the class within the phylum Arthropoda, and Arthropoda is a major phylum of invertebrate animals. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Dinetus duclouxii with other organisms.
